name: Chicken Salads Imperial B1
recipeIngredient: 1 Head iceberg lettuce, cut into strips 1/4 inch x 2 inches
2 1/2 ounces Picked red ginger, cut into long thin strips
1 1/2 ounces Chinese pickles, cut into thin strips
1/2 teaspoon Powdered hot mustard mixed with 1/2 teaspoon Water
1/4 pound Won ton pastry, cut into long strips and deep fried
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before, prepare the chicken broth using a standard recipe or use canned chicken broth for convenience. Slowly simmer until the meat is cooked through.
2. Place the chicken out overnight to dry. The next day, deep fry in peanut oil until golden brown. Separate the meat from the bones and tear into long narrow strips with your hands.
3. Cut green onions, carrots, ginger, and pickles into long strips.
4. Combine the chopped green onions, lettuce, carrots, scallions, red ginger, pickles, peanuts, coconut, and sesame seeds in a large bowl. Mix well.
5. Add chicken to the mixture. Begin with the sugar, then mix the remaining ingredients (except parsley and won ton pastry) until thoroughly combined.
6. Just before serving, add the chopped parsley and deep-fried won ton strips, tossing lightly.
